<!-- downloads-table -->
# Which file do I download?

| Your system | Download |
| --- | --- |
| Debian / Ubuntu / Mint / Pop!_OS | `.deb` |
| Fedora / RHEL / openSUSE | `.rpm` |
| Any other Linux (including Arch) | `.AppImage` |
| Windows 10 / 11 | `-setup.exe` (or `.msi`) |
| macOS | `.dmg` |

Match the file to your CPU: `x86_64` / `amd64` / `x64` = Intel/AMD, `aarch64` / `arm64` = ARM (including Apple Silicon).
